logMessage.description: needs to be unique for the event on same timestamp

affinityWeight.description: if it's not a strict constraint set affinity weight between 1 and 100

count.description: number of devices required on each node

name.description:
name of the device; examples
"gpu" -> type of device request
"nvdia/gpu" -> vendor and type of device reques
"nvidia/gpu/GTX2090Ti" -> above with specif model request

vram.description: specifying min vram in GiB req, 0 means no minimum requirement

inArtifacts.description: input artifacts that needs to pre-fetched before running the node

meta.description: node details, mostly for logging purposes

outArtifacts.description: artifacts to be produced by the node on success.

spec.description: run spec for the node execution environment

evalID.description:
EvalID is id required by engine to return status of the task
example nomad uses evaluation-id

id.description: unique id for the node, this is the same as the dag-node-id

misc.description: any other meta information for engine specific use

name.description: descriptivr name of the node or job

cores.description: [optional] number of cores to reserve for the run

disk.description: [optional] in MB , storage to save files

memory.description: in MB, reserved for the run

memoryMax.description: [optional] in MB,  max memory allowed for the run if the client supports it

count.description: number of nodes to run the job on

devices.description: place the job on nodes with the specific devices, conditions are ORed

x-enum-comments.ArtifactStatusReady: stored and now ready for download

x-enum-descriptions: stored and now ready for download

x-enum-comments.DriverExec: run any raw command or shell script in isolated process
x-enum-comments.DriverRaw: run any raw command or shell script w/o isolation using the engine's user

x-enum-descriptions: run any raw command or shell script in isolated process
run any raw command or shell script w/o isolation using the engine's user

x-enum-comments.FlowRunStatusInit: waiting in queue or for resources to get free

x-enum-descriptions: waiting in queue or for resources to get free

from_bases.description: in edge from basis node s

from_step.description: id of step node production the output. output is always create by only one step

to_inputs.description: id of input nodes the output is forwarded to

pipeline_id.description: every node must belong to a single pipeline

artifacts.description: artifacts produced by this node. more than one in case of multi runs (to avoid running entire pipeline again when running multiple tests scenarios).

execution_mutex.description: to prevent simultaneous access in case a node has multiple parent

started_at.description: it might not be same as execution time if it has to wait for parents or resources to get free

engine_used.description: pipeline level default engine unless overridden by node

flowSinks.description: other than leaves, nodes at which dag run will not propagate further

flowSources.description: node from which dag run started

pipeline.description: the below fields are being saved for debugging purposes and not active used

store_used.description: pipeline level default store unless overridden by node

vertices.description: vmap and pipeline are enough to recreate the dag

depeneds_on.description: other agents it needs to get data or actions taken. e.g. nav agent will depend on sensor agent

required_by.description: e.g. mission agent will depend on nav agent

bounce_duration.description: format time.ParseDuration e.g. 1h, 30m, in case not all values needs to be collected, for e.g.

max_parallel.description: max number of concurrent collect task to run

max_size.description: max size of collected artifact in datasize.ParseString format eg. 1kb, 500mb

allowed_envs.description: limit the execution of basis watcher & colletor to these env, if empty then only primary env is allowed

collector.description: collector config when artifact are fetched by a different process instead of watcher

source.description: ( required ) source config of basis to be used by both watcher to check for new version

watcher.description: ( required ) watcher image and other config details, for now collector uses the same image as watcher

env.description: env variable to set for the container image

no_collect.description: if true then a separate collect job will launch to get new version. To handle cases where collection can take a lot of resources and time

registry_auth.description: auth for registry if image is not public

run_spec.description: resource and other limits along with driver override, other than docker only podman can be used for now

details.description: any other details not captured above

power.description: power related details such as voltage, avg consumption, source capacity (if battery)

budget.description: budget to be used by the resources in this env

params.description: params to be used by the resources in this env

secrets.description: secrets to be used by the pipeline

valid_domains.description: list of email domains allowed for creating users

cable.description: if special cable is used or cable related data needs to be described

device_io.description: details about io addresses used at device for this sensor like gpio pin, usb port etc

kind.description: interface kind e.g. ttl, i2c, usb, ethernet etc

sensor_io.description: details about io addresses used in sensor e.g. pin, usb, port

args.description: sensor related args to passed on to the collector

comm.description: details about communication interface such as protocol, baud rate, etc.

h_fov.description: horizontal field of view in degrees

max_rate_in_hz.description: exoected number of samples per seconds, e.g. for a camera it will be fps

media.description: links to any external info, posts, images

min_rate_in_hz.description: exoected number of samples per seconds, e.g. for a camera it will be fps

power.description: different power reqs like voltage, avg wattage etc

range_unit.description: output unit of the sensor which also to the scale used for min and max range

v_fov.description: vertical field of view in degrees

env_vars.description: Used in setting env variables if needed

registry_auth.description: for username ,pwd,email and server to pull image

run_spec.description: used in allocating extent of resources for this step

auth.description: auth related params that shouldn't be logged

capacity_gb.description: max total capacity to use this store in GBs, 0 means no limits

max_object_size_mb.description: max size of singel object in mb

spec.description: extra connection related params like region, zone, policy etc

active_quorum.description: min percentage of units to be connected for an active fleet e.g., 0.5 for 50%

allow_cross_org.description: don't allow user from other orgs (only parent org users are allowed)

sync_with.description: config for autosync of with an external ouath group like github teams

auth.description: config for multple auth mechanisms like password, github oauth etc

created_at.description: time field is null to ensure 0 time is not used by mistake while inserting

fqdn.description: complete path to the artifact in store e.g. ais://basis-<basis-id>/runs/<run-id>/artifact-name

kind.description: TODO refactor this to type string

path.description: path to the artifact in store (without store details) e.g. basis/runs/<run-id>/artifact-name, unique for a give store

run_id.description: pipeline or basis collectors run id

size.description: size in zero at time of creation, and update after finalizing the artifact (flush for ais)

version.description: version is the unique id created by basis collector for a basis instance, e.g. commit hash, sha256 hash etc

x-enum-comments.CompressionGzip: tar.gz // todo support actual compression, currently only tar is supported

x-enum-descriptions: tar.gz // todo support actual compression, currently only tar is supported

run_seq.description: n for 'n'th build for that pipeline in that env e.g. 1,2,3
